programmes.show_description: Return of the dermatologists, with Dr Dev Shah attempting to 'shell out' a giant lipoma, while Dr Emma McMullen tackles a pair of cysts nicknamed Tweedledum and Tweedledee.

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: ...Pay Up! Agents Sam and Mark pursue a debt from a man who owes nearly £5k in legal fees. In London, Vlad must recover nearly £35k in unpaid rent - but the debtor lives in Dubai.
Documentary series. A young mum lets a young couple stay in her house for free, but ends up locked out of her own home. Nick discovers that his absent tenant has sublet his house.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Elderly patient Elizabeth is suffering with persistent bleeding, a potential sign of cancer.
Dr Toby Nelson checks a patient's back and finds a pre-cancerous mole, Dr Emma McMullen inspects a lipoma on a patient's buttock, and Dr Dev Shah treats a collection of skin tags.
"Team Wiki Woo" competes against the Eggheads.

We meet Bambi Dhami as she teaches new characters Peter the art of selling caravans on the Costa Del Sol. Peter knows she will be able to teach him a lot.
Expat Clint has swapped shoe sales in Hull for horse whispering. It's a dramatic day for Clint when he films his boss falling from a horse she's training and breaking her back.
A heated argument between shoppers takes a dangerous turn, and the possibility of a weapon escalates the incident. Plus, chainsaw-wielding thieves target a convenience store. (Ep10)
A pursuit of reckless getaway driver in stolen car ends with a full-scale search for a suspect. In Ripley, a report of a crashed car leads to an arrest of a drunk man.
Traffic Cops respond to the report of a car linked to an alleged drunken assault with a baseball bat; officers are called to a report of double stabbing at a local pub.
Derbyshire's Road Crime Team lead a county lines drugs crackdown in Chesterfield, capturing three suspects in the space of couple of hours.
Jason is short of festive cheer when a yuletide party becomes a full-blown riot. Adam and Nick uncover a drunk mother driving her daughter to the shops.
Scott and Adam discover a huge stash in the boot of a car, and a runaway dealer just misses mowing down Gary.
Scott and Dave track a pair of mobile phone thieves with the help of GPS technology. Nick pushes his motor to the limit as he pursues a criminal gang.
A woman's claim for missing cosmetics is made up; a gang deliberately causing crashes is brought to justice and a woman running a tanning salon is left red faced.
Justin and Leah are at an impasse. Lacey is triggered. Abigail guns for an anniversary re-do.
Levi talks some sense into Remi. Lacey opens up to Holden. Cash is forced to lie to his wife.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Five-year-old Saira has a severe peanut allergy, and was spotted eating something off the floor at nursery.
A high call-out for ambulances has resulted in paramedics queuing with patients in the corridor at Barnsley Casualty. The team must decide who is seen and who can wait.
Seventeen-year-old Dougie is rushed in by helicopter after a mountain bike accident leaves him with a catastrophic head injury. A scan shows his brain is bleeding.
There's a category one call for an 18-month-old thought to be suffering an anaphylactic shock. And teams attend a serious head-on collision involving a car and delivery van.
Dr Toby treats one of the largest lipomas the clinic has seen; Dr Natalia deals with a supersized warty lesion; Dr Emma sorts out a cyst that patient Barry's wife has enjoyed squeezing.
Catching up with the victims and villains of the rental market. Rachel intended to rent out her cottage for three months; four years later, her tenant is still there.
Craig has been battling to get his property back after three months of no rent. Terry was relieved to get his home back, before Sophia called the police.
Documentary series. In Bristol, Jon's dream of turning a former tram staion into flats was derailed by squatters, has he managed to get things back on track?
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonia's finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.
The "Think Tank" tries to defeat the Eggheads.

Kerrie's apology is too little, too late. Harper backs Tane. David learns a shocking truth.
A shocking diagnosis is revealed. Leah turns to Alf for help. Eden's concerned for her friend.
Leah's world crumbles. Eden's out of the loop. Can Levi get through to a stubborn friend?
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
In Chelsea, a female shoplifter is compliant at first, but then she tries to do a runner. And meet the former shoplifter who now works with shopkeepers to prevent their losses. (Ep6)
In Newton Abbot, undercover detective Nush spots a suspicious character in the crowds. She tails the suspect into a card shop but there's a problem - the suspect has disappeared.
Documentary series. Landlords fall foul of two young tenants who are using their rental property as a film set. But the tenants have stopped paying the rent and won't leave.
Documentary series. Landlords fall foul of two young tenants who are using their rental property as a film set. Eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock at an abandoned printworks.
Documentary series. After offering a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, a landlord then struggles to evict her, and her partner.
Documentary series. A doctor needs to evict a defaulting tenant from his old family home. Over 30 men found living in an unsafe house refuse to name the landlord.
A gang use a broken-down ice-cream van to try and scam thousands of pounds. Secret filming reveals a fraudster's grossly exaggerated injuries.
Fantasy film starring Lily Collins and Julia Roberts. Snow White fights for her kingdom with the seven dwarfs, after the evil Queen steals her throne. (2012)

Ocean-bound travelogue with ex-cruise singer Jane McDonald. Highlights of Jane's cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico.
